title: lappula macrantha
intro: Lappula macrantha is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae), commonly known as large-head lappula. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Lappula macrantha include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
